fun_fact: Nuclear power is one of the cleanest energy sources available — it emits almost no greenhouse gases during operation. India currently generates about 8 GW of nuclear power, but has set an ambitious target of **100 GW by 2047**, including at least 5 Small Modular Reactors (SMRs). That's a 12x leap, aimed at powering a clean and reliable energy future as the country grows. [Read more](https://www.pib.gov.in/PressReleasePage.aspx?PRID=2249783&reg=3&lang=2#:~:text=SMR%20Target%3A%20At%20least%20five,clean%20and%20reliable%20energy%20roadmap.)
